Вина доказана. Орудие правосудия готово свершить {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Неизбежную кару{/g}.

languages.text: Die Schuld ist erwiesen. Die Waffe der Gerechtigkeit fährt mit {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Unausweichliche Vergeltung{/g} fort.
languages.original_text: The guilt is proven. The Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Die Schuld ist erwiesen. Die Waffe der Gerechtigkeit fährt mit {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Unausweichliche Vergeltung{/g} fort.

languages.text: La culpabilité de l'individu accusé ne fait plus aucun doute. Le bras armé de la justice procède aussitôt au {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Châtiment inéluctable{/g}.
languages.original_text: The guilt is proven. The Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: La culpabilité de l'individu accusé ne fait plus aucun doute. Le bras armé de la justice procède aussitôt au {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Châtiment inéluctable{/g}.

languages.text: 罪证确凿无疑，正义武装即将发动{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}审判将至{/g}。
languages.original_text: The guilt is proven. The Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 罪证确凿无疑，正义武装即将发动{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}审判将至{/g}。

languages.text: Culpabilidad demostrada. El Arma de la Justicia desata el {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Castigo ineludible{/g}.
languages.original_text: The guilt is proven. The Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Culpabilidad demostrada. El Arma de la Justicia desata el {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Castigo ineludible{/g}.

languages.text: 罪は証明された。正義の武器が{g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}不可避な報復{/g}を進める。
languages.original_text: The guilt is proven. The Weapon of Justice proceeds with {g|f:dffbc4538c8f4571b56ffb0b9c93e5c3}Inevitable Retribution{/g}.
